GLOSSARY

sections.title: GLOSSARY
sections.summary: Tele: +251 111 568464 +251 111 564226 +251 111 115131 Fax: +251 111 115470 YOUR RELIABLE DATA SOURCE Website : www.ess.gov.et P.O.Box፡ 1143 The Consumer Price Index (CPI), a key economic statistics, is surveyed, analyzed, and made available to data users on a monthly basis. The year - on - year, general inflation rate (annual percentage change) in the country stood at 13.2 percent for the month of September EFY2018.
